# Privacy Policy

**Effective date:** January 1, 2026  
**Last updated:** June 15, 2026

## 1. Information we collect

### 1.1 Information you provide

We collect information you give us directly, including:

- Account data: name, email address, and organization name.
- Billing data: credit card details, billing address, and tax ID.
- Content data: the text, markup, and metadata you submit for GEO analysis.

### 1.2 Information collected automatically

When you use GeoOpt, we automatically collect:

- Log data: IP address, browser type, referring URLs, timestamps.
- Usage data: features accessed, pages viewed, audit volume.
- Device data: operating system, screen resolution, time zone.

## 2. How we use your information

We use collected information for the following purposes:

| Purpose                               | Legal basis (EEA/UK)  |
| ------------------------------------- | --------------------- |
| Providing and maintaining the service | Contractual necessity |
| Processing payments                   | Contractual necessity |
| Sending service updates               | Legitimate interest   |
| Improving the product                 | Legitimate interest   |
| Complying with legal obligations      | Legal obligation      |

Marketing communications are sent only with your consent, which you may
withdraw at any time.

## 3. Data retention

| Data category       | Retention period                       |
| ------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
| Account data        | Duration of account + 30 days          |
| Billing data        | 7 years (tax compliance)               |
| Content data (Pro)  | Discarded after audit (zero-retention) |
| Content data (Free) | Up to 7 days                           |
| Log data            | 90 days                                |

## 4. Your rights

Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:

- Access the personal data we hold about you.
- Correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
- Delete your data ("right to be forgotten").
- Restrict or object to processing.
- Data portability.
- Withdraw consent for marketing.

To exercise these rights, contact [privacy@geoopt.example.com](mailto:privacy@geoopt.example.com).
We respond within 30 calendar days as required by GDPR Article 12.

## 5. Data transfers

We process data in the United States and the European Union. Transfers from
the EEA/UK to the US are governed by Standard Contractual Clauses and
supplemented by technical measures where required.

## 6. Subprocessors

| Provider | Purpose              | Location |
| -------- | -------------------- | -------- |
| AWS      | Cloud infrastructure | US, EU   |
| Stripe   | Payment processing   | US       |
| Sentry   | Error monitoring     | US       |

A current list is maintained at [geoopt.example.com/subprocessors](https://geoopt.example.com/subprocessors).
